description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The body is primarily yellow with red and white accents, and it features a clear, enclosed cockpit canopy positioned near the front of the fuselage. The tail section is painted red and includes a conventional vertical stabilizer with a horizontal stabilizer at the base. The wings are straight and low-mounted, each displaying colored roundels and red stripes. The landing gear is a tricycle type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the airplane appears to be constructed mainly from metal and composite materials.
description: A small, yellow and red single-propeller airplane with a low-wing design, enclosed cockpit, and tricycle landing gear. Features include a streamlined fuselage, colored roundels, and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, propeller, single main landing gear, and cockpit canopy with visible roundel and red tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full wingspan, tail assembly, and both main landing gear units beneath the wings.
description_view_2: Side view from the right, displaying the propeller, cockpit, right main landing gear, and tail with visible markings.
description_view_3: Front view showing the propeller, nose wheel, cockpit canopy, and symmetrical wing design with colored stripes.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers at the base.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
